content:
✅ All 8 renderer files for the Aadhaar Photo Printer have been created successfully at:

**`C:\Users\DELL\.gemini\antigravity\scratch\aadhaar-photo-printer\src\renderer\`**

### Files Created:

| # | File | Size | Description |
|---|------|------|-------------|
| 1 | `index.html` | Full SPA | Three-panel layout with header, footer, settings modal, receipt modal, success overlay, toast container. All interactive elements have unique IDs, semantic HTML5, ARIA attributes. |
| 2 | `styles/main.css` | Design system | 50+ CSS custom properties (light + dark), full reset/normalize, app shell layout (3-panel flex), custom scrollbars, focus rings, theme transition helper, responsive breakpoints. |
| 3 | `styles/components.css` | Components | Upload zone (drag-over animations, pulsing glow), photo cards (slide-in/out, processing spinner, AI badge), A4 preview (correct 210:297 ratio, grid layouts, cell pop animation), print button (gradient, pulse-when-ready), quality/layout pill selectors, customer form (modern inputs with focus glow), modals (glassmorphism backdrop-filter, slide-up animation), receipt card (monospace thermal-receipt style), toasts (slide-in from right, color-coded, auto-dismiss progress bar), success overlay (animated SVG checkmark with stroke-dasharray), progress bars (striped animation). |
| 4 | `scripts/app.js` | Controller | State management, DOMContentLoaded init, settings load/save via `window.electronAPI`, file upload handling (FileReader → data URL), print/export-PDF/receipt/backup/AI workflows, keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+O/P/E, Escape), layout/quality/zoom/pagination controls, footer status updates. |
| 5 | `scripts/photoGrid.js` | Photo grid | IIFE module: render list, add/remove with animations, processing spinner overlay, thumbnail update, AI quality badge (green/yellow/red dot), recent photos section with date grouping and click-to-re-add. |
| 6 | `scripts/preview.js` | A4 preview | IIFE module: renders CSS Grid cells in the A4 container for 4×3 (12), 5×3 (15), 1×1 layouts. Pagination support, staggered cell-pop animation, empty slot placeholders with cut guides. |
| 7 | `scripts/ui.js` | UI manager | IIFE module: dark mode toggle with smooth transition class, toast notifications (stacked, auto-dismiss, progress bar, SVG icons), success animation overlay, modal show/hide with fade/slide animations, progress bars, drag-drop zone setup with visual feedback. |
| 8 | `scripts/receipts.js` | Receipts | IIFE module: generates formatted receipt HTML (shop name, customer info, line items, ₹ total, thank-you footer), prints via detached window with auto-close. |

### Design Highlights:
- **Glassmorphism** modals with `backdrop-filter: blur(8px)`
- **Animated SVG checkmark** on print success (stroke-dasharray animation)
- **Pulsing green print button** when photos are ready
- **Photo cards** slide in from left, slide out on remove
- **Toast notifications** stack vertically, auto-dismiss with shrinking progress bar
- **Dark mode** with smooth 500ms cross-fade transition
- **A4 preview** maintains exact 210:297 ratio with paper shadow
- **Minimum 14px** font size enforced everywhere
- **44px+** touch targets on all interactive elements
- **Full keyboard accessibility**: Ctrl+O, Ctrl+P, Ctrl+E, Escape, tab navigation with visible focus rings

All modules expose themselves on `window` (PhotoGrid, PagePreview, UIManager, ReceiptManager) and communicate through `window.appState` and `window.electronAPI`.

toolCall.name: send_message
